summary:
Perfect! The fix is working correctly. The needle (bug) was found and fixed.

**Summary:**
The bug was in the pagination offset calculation in `app/app.py`. The code had:
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)
```

This was subtracting 1 from the offset for every page after page 1, causing page 2 to start at ID 10 instead of ID 11 (overlapping with the last item of page 1). 

**The fix:**
Changed it to the correct formula:
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

This ensures proper pagination where page 1 shows items 0-9 (IDs 1-10), page 2 shows items 10-19 (IDs 11-20), etc., with no overlap or gaps between pages.
